items.title: Ferrari marketing boss quits just weeks after EV launch backlash
items.summary: The design of the luxury carmaker's first all-electric vehicle, the Luce, was heavily criticised.

items.title: Live Updates: Spain Warns of High Death Toll in Heat Wave
items.summary: The health ministry said about 200 people may have died since Sunday. The forecast across Europe was set to remain sharply above normal on Thursday.
